message:
feat(python): numpy.iscomplex wrapper parity (franken_numpy-nyr1)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.iscomplex(x) returning a bool
array True at element positions with non-zero imaginary parts. Test
covers a mixed complex array, all-real complex dtype array (all
False), real float array (all False), integer array (all False),
2-D complex element-wise, and a Python list of complex literals.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
